lever: column-tiled real Householder reflector dot/update loops
profile_backing: Ready perf bead frankenjax-p1vbf.24 identified QR reflector column walks as the blocked-QR residual after generic matmul_2d panel updates regressed.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf24-qr1024-baseline-head cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf24-qr1024-tiled cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism.ordering: Each affected output column still accumulates reflector dot products in ascending row order; reflector generation, reverse Q application order, diagonal sign normalization, Q/R shapes, and fallback guards are unchanged.
isomorphism.floating_point: Per-column add/mul/sub order is unchanged. The new tile only interleaves independent columns inside each row; no reduction order, FMA intent, pivot/tie rule, or RNG surface exists.

validation: RCH ts2 cargo test -p fj-lax --lib qr_ -- --nocapture: 10 passed
RCH ts2 cargo test -p fj-conformance --test linalg_oracle qr -- --nocapture: 8 passed
RCH ts1 cargo test -p fj-conformance --test linalg_higher_rank qr -- --nocapture: 2 passed
RCH ts2 cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets: passed
RCH ts2 cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings: passed
git diff --check on QR changed files: passed
cargo fmt -p fj-lax --check: blocked by pre-existing formatting drift outside the QR hunk; the QR hunk itself is diff-check clean
UBS on linalg.rs and lax_baseline.rs: nonzero due existing panic/indexing inventories; embedded fmt/clippy/check/test subchecks clean
